name: search_files
description: Search for files and folders across the user's entire OneDrive by name or content keywords. The search is performed across all files the user has access to, including shared items.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query string. Searches file names and content.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.
